title: inula uniflora
intro: Inula uniflora, also known as the single-flowered elecampane, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family. The roots of this plant are used in herbal medicine, rich in sesquiterpenes and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Inula uniflora have been found to provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as other health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Inula uniflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to soothe the respiratory system and alleviate digestive issues.
